obligations.requirement: Transparency obligations on AI systems intended to interact with natural persons (clear notice that the user is interacting with an AI system, unless obvious from context).
Classification of GPAI models and identification of systemic-risk models.
Technical documentation, training data summary, copyright policy, instructions for downstream providers.
Authorised representative requirement for non-EU GPAI providers placing models on the EU market.
Additional obligations for systemic-risk GPAI: model evaluations, adversarial testing, incident reporting, cybersecurity protection.
